message:
fix(connection): resolve EXISTS/Subquery in HAVING via eager substitution (#94) + 18 conformance tests

HAVING clauses containing EXISTS or scalar subqueries returned Null
(evaluate_having_value catch-all). Added resolve_having_subqueries()
which substitutes outer column refs and executes subqueries eagerly,
applied at all 4 HAVING evaluation sites.

Added 18 conformance oracle tests (s153b-s170): subquery-in-HAVING,
conditional aggregates, multiple CTEs, table constraints, correlated
EXISTS in WHERE, self-joins, COALESCE/IFNULL chains, INSERT DEFAULT
VALUES, complex ORDER BY, GROUP BY expressions, UPDATE/DELETE with
subqueries, nested aggregates+joins, string concat, set operations,
CROSS JOIN, multi-insert, NULL ordering. 477 pass, 0 fail, 1 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
